# WholesaleOS.ai — The AI-Powered Wholesale Analyst for Amazon Sellers
# This file helps AI language models understand this website.

## What is WholesaleOS.ai?
WholesaleOS.ai is the AI-powered operating system for Amazon wholesale sellers.
It combines product research, profitability analysis, brand intelligence,
competitor monitoring, supplier relationship management, and AI-powered
recommendations into one platform. It uses live data from the Keepa API to
provide 90-day price history, Best Seller Rank (BSR) trends, FBA seller
counts, profit margins, and a scored buy/no-buy verdict.

## Mission
To help Amazon wholesale sellers discover profitable opportunities, make
smarter sourcing decisions, and scale faster through artificial intelligence
and automation.

## Vision
To become the operating system that powers every successful Amazon wholesale
business.

## Core Features
- ASIN Lookup: fetches live price history, BSR, FBA seller count, ratings, and monthly sales estimate from Keepa
- Product Scoring: 15+ weighted criteria producing EXCELLENT / GOOD / AVERAGE / BAD / REJECT verdicts
- Profit Calculator: auto-calculates referral fee, FBA fulfillment fee, storage, net profit, ROI, and break-even price
- Brand Intelligence: scores wholesale brands on 11 criteria (IP complaints, hazmat, MAP policy, FBA seller density, sales velocity, etc.)
- Search History: every lookup saved per user account

## Target Users
Amazon wholesale sellers, FBA sellers, online arbitrage (OA) sellers, product researchers

## How the Product Score Works
Hard-reject checks (IP complaint on record, hazmat product, authenticity complaint, listing not active, no Buy Box) immediately fail a product.
Scored criteria (BSR rank, profit margin, ROI, review count, FBA seller count, price trend, Buy Box stability) contribute weighted points.
Final verdict: EXCELLENT (85%+), GOOD (70-84%), AVERAGE (55-69%), BAD (40-54%), REJECT (below 40% or any hard-reject fails).

## How the Brand Intelligence Score Works
11 criteria scored on pass/fail basis with weights.
Hard-reject criteria: no official website, no registered business details, history of mass account takedowns.
Scored criteria: brand active within 30 days, IP complaints in last 12 months, IP-Alert red flags, FBA sellers per ASIN (ideal 3-5), monthly sales per ASIN (>100 units), hazmat-heavy catalogue, adult/high-risk category.
Decision: APPROVED if all hard checks pass and weighted score is 70% or above.

## Data Sources
- Keepa API: real-time Amazon price history, BSR, offer counts, review data, sales estimates
- ip-alert.com: IP complaint history database for Amazon brands
- who.is: domain and business registration verification

## Contact
support@wholesaleos.ai

https://wholesaleos.ai
